title: Implement Node Entity Classes
description: Create Human_Post entity with @Node (node_id UUID, content, author_id, created_at, embedding nullable). Create AI_Consensus entity with @Node (node_id UUID, summary_content, agent_version, created_at, embedding nullable). No update methods exposed — enforcing immutability.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN user submits post THEN creates Human_Post with generated UUID, content, author_id, current timestamp, null embedding; WHEN system performs merge THEN creates AI_Consensus with UUID, summary, agent version, timestamp; WHEN client attempts to modify existing node content THEN system rejects (no update methods in repository); SHALL NOT provide update operations for node content after creation; WHEN duplicate node_id attempted THEN constraint violation occurs; ref: specs/node-entities/spec.md:4-45; ref: Doc/req.md:227-246 (§6.2-6.3 节点标签与必填属性); ref: Doc/req.md:104 (§3.3 验收1: 历史节点内容不被修改)
review_initial_requirements: Decision 2: UUID v4 for node_id (not DB-generated), enables idempotency; Decision 4: immutability via app-level constraints, not DB triggers; Embedding field nullable—deferred to AI integration phase; Verify properties match req.md §6.2 mandatory fields exactly
review_regression_requirements: Risk: immutability relies on application code not DB constraints (design.md Risk); Mitigation: integration tests must verify no update path exists; Future: consider APOC procedures for validation
notes:
P0 Constraint: immutable nodes (design.md Constraints). Embedding dimension deferred (Open Question 1). Blocked by: CGF-01-01.
picked_reason:P0核心数据模型先行，先定义节点实体可解锁关系、仓储、服务与API层实现
done_at:2026-03-08
evidence:新增HumanPost与AIConsensus两个@Node实体，映射node_id/content(author)/summary(agent)/created_at/embedding并去除setter实现不可变

title: Implement Relationship Properties Classes
description: Create BranchedFromRelationship, MergedIntoRelationship, SynthesizedFromRelationship as @RelationshipProperties with audit fields (operator_type, operator_id, created_at, reason). Wire relationships to entity classes via @Relationship annotations.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN system creates dissenting branch THEN BRANCHED_FROM created with all audit metadata (operator_type, operator_id, created_at, reason); WHEN system merges content into trunk THEN MERGED_INTO created with audit metadata; WHEN system creates AI_Consensus from Human_Posts THEN SYNTHESIZED_FROM created to each contributor with audit metadata; SHALL NOT allow modification or deletion of version evolution relationships; WHEN querying historical relationships THEN returns original audit metadata unchanged; ref: specs/graph-relationships/spec.md:4-45; ref: Doc/req.md:247-257 (§6.4 核心有向边: BRANCHED_FROM, MERGED_INTO, SYNTHESIZED_FROM); ref: Doc/req.md:108 (§3.3 验收5: 审计信息记录)
review_initial_requirements: Decision 3: @RelationshipProperties for type-safe audit fields (not Map<String,Object>); Open Question 4 resolved: SYNTHESIZED_FROM also carries audit metadata; Verify relationship types match req.md §6.2 (BRANCHED_FROM, MERGED_INTO, SYNTHESIZED_FROM)
review_regression_requirements: Risk: no DAG cycle detection at write time in this phase—deferred (design.md Risk); Mitigation: assume correct usage, add service-layer cycle validation in next phase; Verify relationship immutability via absence of delete methods
notes:
P0 Constraints: DAG integrity + audit trail (design.md Constraints). Open Question 4 resolved: all relationships carry audit. Blocked by: CGF-01-01.
picked_reason:P0关系审计模型是lineage/provenance查询前置，优先补齐关系属性与实体挂接
done_at:2026-03-08

title: Add Custom Cypher Lineage & Provenance Queries
description: Add @Query Cypher for lineage traversal: -[:BRANCHED_FROM|MERGED_INTO*1..N]-> with configurable max_depth. Add @Query Cypher for provenance lookup: -[:SYNTHESIZED_FROM]-> single-hop retrieval.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN system executes lineage query THEN uses Cypher -[:BRANCHED_FROM|MERGED_INTO*1..{max_depth}]->; WHEN system executes provenance query THEN uses -[:SYNTHESIZED_FROM]->; WHEN traversing lineage THEN only follows version evolution relationships, ignoring CONCEPTUAL_OVERLAP and RELATES_TO; ref: specs/node-query-api/spec.md:53-61; ref: Doc/req.md:267-273 (§6.5 场景一: 溯源路径 Cypher 示例); ref: Doc/req.md:279-285 (§6.5 场景二: 穿透式确权 Cypher); ref: Doc/req.md:107 (§3.3 验收2: 溯源返回完整路径; 验收4: 语义关联不参与溯源)
review_initial_requirements: Decision 5: Cypher @Query over SDN derived queries for variable-length paths; Verify Cypher patterns align with req.md §6.5 examples; max_depth default 10 per req.md §5.5 lineage endpoint and Open Question 3
review_regression_requirements: Lineage must exclude semantic relationships (req.md §3.3 验收4); Performance: must be efficient for 10-hop traversal (design.md Constraints); Verify correct paths in multi-parent DAG scenarios
notes:
Blocked by: CGF-03-01. Decision 5: Cypher for complex traversals. Open Question 3 resolved: max_depth default 10, configurable via query param.
picked_reason:P1查询能力直接支撑lineage/provenance接口，先补Cypher确保后续服务层可复用
done_at:2026-03-08
evidence:在HumanPostRepository新增BRANCHED_FROM|MERGED_INTO lineage查询（maxDepth过滤）；在AIConsensusRepository新增SYNTHESIZED_FROM provenance查询
validation_limited:当前环境仅JRE，mvn -DskipTests compile无法执行Java编译

title: Implement Database Schema Initialization
description: Create DatabaseInitializer with @PostConstruct. Execute Cypher for: node_id uniqueness constraint (IF NOT EXISTS), author_id index on Human_Post, created_at indexes on both node types. Log constraint verification results; fail startup if constraint creation fails.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN app starts and connects to Neo4j THEN creates uniqueness constraint on node_id IF NOT EXISTS; WHEN app starts THEN creates index on Human_Post.author_id IF NOT EXISTS; WHEN app starts THEN creates created_at indexes for both node types IF NOT EXISTS; WHEN constraint creation fails THEN system fails startup to prevent inconsistent state; WHEN app restarts with existing constraints THEN skips creation without errors; SHALL use IF NOT EXISTS for idempotent schema initialization; ref: specs/graph-constraints/spec.md:4-56; ref: Doc/req.md:232-236 (§6.2 必要约束: node_id唯一, author_id索引, created_at索引, embedding向量索引)
review_initial_requirements: IF NOT EXISTS clauses for idempotency (spec requirement); Verify constraint names are clear and logged; Schema init must complete before accepting traffic
review_regression_requirements: Verify partial constraint state recovery (some but not all constraints present); Startup failure must be clean and descriptive; Repeated startup must be safe
notes:
Blocked by: CGF-01-01 (Neo4j connection required). Idempotent schema init supports safe restarts. Vector index deferred per Non-Goals.
picked_reason:P1先落库约束与索引，避免后续服务/API写入时出现数据一致性隐患
done_at:2026-03-08
evidence:新增DatabaseInitializer在@PostConstruct执行约束/索引创建并在失败时抛异常终止启动，随后记录约束校验结果

title: Implement Post Submission Service
description: Create PostService with createHumanPost method. Generate UUID node_id. Implement idempotency check via request_id before node creation. Add @Transactional for ACID guarantees.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN user submits post THEN creates Human_Post with generated UUID; WHEN client provides request_id THEN system stores it for audit trail; WHEN duplicate request_id received THEN returns previous result without creating duplicate node; WHEN service method completes THEN all graph changes committed atomically; WHEN exception thrown THEN transaction rolled back; ref: specs/post-submission-api/spec.md:29-38; ref: specs/graph-storage/spec.md:14-23; ref: Doc/req.md:176-179 (§5.5 POST /api/posts 请求字段); ref: Doc/req.md:40 (§2.2.2 幂等与去重: request_id/event_id)
review_initial_requirements: request_id must be client-provided for idempotency (Open Question 2 resolved); UUID v4 for node_id (Decision 2); @Transactional with ACID per graph-storage spec; Verify idempotency handles concurrent duplicate requests
review_regression_requirements: Transaction rollback verified on exception; Idempotency check must not create race condition; Verify request_id stored and queryable for full-chain tracing per req.md §5.6
notes:
Blocked by: CGF-03-01. Open Question 2 resolved: client provides request_id. req.md §5.6 requires request_id全链路透传.
picked_reason:P1先实现请求去重与事务写入，确保POST链路具备幂等基础

title: Implement Node Query Service

title: Create API Response Wrapper & Error Handling
description: Create ApiResponse<T> wrapper with code (Integer), message (String), data (T). Implement @ControllerAdvice with @ExceptionHandler for 400/404/500 returning unified ApiResponse format.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN API succeeds THEN returns {code: 0, message: "ok", data: {...}}; WHEN API fails THEN returns {code: non-zero, message: error description, data: null or error details}; ref: specs/post-submission-api/spec.md:18-27; ref: Doc/req.md:131-139 (§5.1 统一响应结构); ref: Doc/req.md:164-171 (§5.4 最小响应约定)
review_initial_requirements: Response format must exactly match req.md §5.1 structure: {code, message, data}; Error codes consistent and documented; Exception handlers must not leak stack traces to client
review_regression_requirements: Verify all endpoints use ApiResponse wrapper consistently; Verify error format in edge cases (null body, malformed JSON, unexpected exceptions)
notes:
API response convention is project-wide; must be established before controllers. No external dependencies—can be built in parallel with Phase 3-5.
picked_reason:P1先统一响应与异常语义，保证后续控制器行为一致
done_at:2026-03-08
evidence:新增ApiResponse<T>统一返回体与GlobalExceptionHandler，覆盖400/404/500异常映射

title: Implement Post Submission Controller
description: Create PostController with POST /api/posts. Accept request_id, author_id, content, optional target_node_id. Return HTTP 202 Accepted with event_id and status QUEUED. Validate required fields.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN valid POST with request_id, author_id, content THEN returns HTTP 202 with event_id and status "QUEUED"; WHEN missing required fields (request_id, author_id, content) THEN returns HTTP 400 with error details; WHEN duplicate request_id THEN returns idempotent response (same event_id); SHALL return HTTP 202 within 100ms without waiting for graph write; ref: specs/post-submission-api/spec.md:4-49; ref: Doc/req.md:154 (§5.3 POST /api/posts); ref: Doc/req.md:176-179 (§5.5 请求字段)
review_initial_requirements: Decision 6: HTTP 202 even though synchronous now—future-proof API contract; Verify field names match req.md §5.5 exactly (request_id, author_id, content, target_node_id); target_node_id is optional per spec
review_regression_requirements: Verify 202 response time under load; API contract must remain stable when async queue is added later; Validate consistent error response format
notes: Blocked by: CGF-05-01, CGF-06-01. Decision 6: 202 Accepted for future async compatibility. req.md §5.6 requires event_id for status tracking.

title: Implement Node Query Controller
description: Create NodeController with GET /api/nodes/{id}, GET /api/nodes/{id}/lineage (max_depth param, default 10), GET /api/nodes/{id}/provenance. Return standardized ApiResponse.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN GET /api/nodes/{id} for Human_Post THEN returns {node_id, label: "Human_Post", content, author_id, created_at}; WHEN GET /api/nodes/{id} for AI_Consensus THEN returns {node_id, label: "AI_Consensus", summary_content, agent_version, created_at}; WHEN node not found THEN HTTP 404 with {code: 404, message: "Node not found", data: null}; WHEN GET lineage without max_depth THEN traverses up to 10 hops via BRANCHED_FROM/MERGED_INTO; WHEN GET lineage?max_depth=5 THEN traverses up to 5 hops; WHEN GET provenance for AI_Consensus THEN returns human_posts array; ref: specs/node-query-api/spec.md:3-61; ref: Doc/req.md:157-159 (§5.3 GET接口); ref: Doc/req.md:193-204 (§5.5 响应字段)
review_initial_requirements: max_depth query param with default 10 (Open Question 3 resolved); Provenance for Human_Post returns empty array not error; Response fields must match req.md §5.5 exactly
review_regression_requirements: Verify lineage only follows version evolution edges; Response format consistency with ApiResponse wrapper; Performance: 10-hop lineage should not timeout (60s limit per req.md §11.2)
notes: Blocked by: CGF-05-02, CGF-06-01. Implements P0 use case: lineage query (req.md §4.1). Open Question 3 resolved: default 10, configurable.
